hero.title: Every night is
hero.subtitle: IDILI Live is a global producer, promoter and presenter of extraordinary live experiences — from West End musicals to immersive dining theatre, world-class opera to landmark exhibitions.

intro.heading: Where craft meets
intro.body1: IDILI Live was founded in 2016 by Ingrid Sutej and Miguel Esteban, two of the live events industry's most respected figures. Between them, they bring three decades of experience spanning almost every genre of entertainment imaginable.
intro.body2: Ingrid has produced and promoted hit West End musicals and concert tours across Europe with world-renowned opera stars. Miguel co-founded the Verbier Festival and manages leading artists including soprano Anna Netrebko.

productions.title: Mamma Mia! The Party
productions.description: London & Stockholm. An immersive ABBA-themed theatrical dining experience that redefined the genre.

productions.title: Elf The Musical
productions.description: The beloved festive spectacular, staged across the UK & US
productions.long_description:
Son of a Nutracker! Elf The Musical charmed audiences on both sides of the Atlantic last Christmas as it returned to the UK and USA in 2025.

Returning to the West End for a strictly limited Christmas run at the Aldywch Theatre, the London all-star cast included Joel Montague, Carrie Hope Fletcher and Aled Jones MBE as Buddy, Jovie and Walter Hobbs respectively. 

On the other side of the pond, the show undertook a new Sparklejollytwinklejingley tour of North America, taking in 10 cities in 10 weeks.

The 2025 season followed two hugely successful runs in London’s West End in 2022 and 2023, and a record breaking run on Broadway in 2024. Based on the beloved 2003 New Line Cinema hit starring Will Ferrell, this smash-hit musical features a book by Tony Award-winners Thomas Meehan (Annie, The Producers, Hairspray) and Bob Martin (The Drowsy Chaperone), with songs by Tony Award nominees Matthew Sklar and Chad Beguelin (The Wedding Singer).

productions.title: Rent The Musical
productions.description: 20th anniversary UK tour. Multi-award-winning rock musical returning to the West End.

productions.title: ABBA: Super Troupers The Exhibition
productions.description: The official ABBA exhibition, presented in London.

productions.title: Les Grandes Voix
productions.description: Well-established series featuring world-class operatic stars
productions.long_description:
Established in 1993, Les Grandes Voix began as recitals with singers and piano, then quickly grew and broadened its horizons: more concerts, more partnerships with other venues, more artists from different parts of the world, a wider repertoire spanning from baroque to Bel Canto and chamber music.

Regarded as a leading and benchmark series for operatic concerts in the French and European musical landscape, Les Grandes Voix has contributed to the artistic recognition in France of major artists such as Benjamin Bernheim, Roberto Alagna, Juan Diego Flórez, Cecilia Bartoli, Anna Netrebko, Joyce DiDonato, Elina Garança, Jakub Orlinski, Sabine Devieilhe, Pretty Yende and the Capuçon brothers — by organising their first solo recitals in France.

productions.title: Monet's Garden
productions.description: A 360-degree journey immersive art experience through the history and works of Claude Monet.
productions.long_description:
"A colourful installation and an intense sound landscape turn Monet's masterpieces into a grand spectacle of his work."  - Berliner Morgenpost

Monet’s Garden - The Immersive Experience opened in Stockholm in October 2023 following successful appearances in New York, Vienna and Hamburg. Due to popular demand it was extended until March 2024, and welcomed over 100,000 visitors during it’s Swedish run.

Monet’s Garden is an immersive art experience that give visitors a 360-degree journey through the history and works of one of the greatest artists of the past century, Claude Monet. 

This unique exhibition concept is staged with state-of-the-art multi-media technology, which allows visitors to immerse themselves completely inside the world of Claude Monet and some of his most famous artworks. Elaborate installations and projections, combined with a musical soundscape, create rushing worlds of colour and light making the paintings come alive in a way never seen before.

productions.title: Viva Frida Kahlo!
productions.description: A sensory journey through Frida's world and art.
productions.long_description:
VIVA FRIDA KAHLO is a unique staging of the world-famous works by legendary Mexican artist Frida Kahlo. After successful residencies in Zurich, Brussels, Munich, Berlin, Hamburg and Vienna, VIVA FRIDA KAHLO made its Scandinavian debut at Amiralen in Malmo in February and ran until June 2025.

VIVA FRIDA KAHLO takes visitors on a sensory journey through Frida’s world and art, by bringing her paintings to life using the latest technology to project onto walls up to 24 metres long and 5.5 metres high, as well as onto the floor of the exhibition hall. In addition, visitors can also enjoy a virtual reality experience that takes them inside some of the artists’ most famous and well-loved works, as they journey through the symbolism and dreams of Frida Kahlo, and becoming part of her world.

productions.title: CATS
productions.long_description:
Andrew Lloyd Webber’s record-breaking musical CATS headed to Opera de Monte-Carlo for a completely sold-out 2 week run in December 2025.

Adapted from TS Eliot’s ‘Old Possum’s Book of Practical Cats’, this "groundbreaking musical" (Daily Express) comes together in a sparkling fusion of music, dance and verse. On just one special night of the year, all Jellicle cats meet at the Jellicle Ball where Old Deuteronomy, their wise and benevolent leader, makes the Jellicle choice and announces which of them will go up to The Heaviside Layer and be reborn into a whole new Jellicle life. 

With "timeless music, spectacular sets and a superb cast" (Daily Mirror), breathtaking choreography and of course the unforgettable ‘Memory’, CATS is a magical musical like no other.

about.heading: A boutique studio with
about.body1: IDILI Live was founded in 2016 by Ingrid Sutej and Miguel Esteban, two of the live events industry's most respected figures. Between them, they bring three decades of experience spanning almost every genre of entertainment imaginable.
about.body2: Ingrid has produced and promoted hit West End musicals and concert tours across Europe with world-renowned opera stars. Miguel co-founded the Verbier Festival and manages leading artists including soprano Anna Netrebko.
about.quote: We believe every performance is a once-in-a-lifetime event — and we produce accordingly.
about.body3: Our close-knit but extensive team works across immersive theatre, classical music, exhibitions and large-scale musicals, always with the same commitment to exceptional production values and unforgettable audience experiences.
